CustomField.description: Derived MD-1 territory/book segment for Sales Director monthly reporting and Pipeline Inspection filtering. Mirrors the validated D1 MD-1 preset mapping from 2026-04-09.
CustomField.formula: IF( AND( ISPICKVAL(Account_Unit_Group__c, "SC Asia"), TEXT(Account.Region__c) = "APAC" ), "APAC", IF( AND( ISPICKVAL(Account_Unit_Group__c, "SC EMEA"), TEXT(Account.Region__c) = "Central Europe" ), "Central Europe", IF( AND( ISPICKVAL(Account_Unit_Group__c, "SC EMEA"), TEXT(Account.Region__c) = "Southwestern Europe" ), "Southern Europe", IF( AND( ISPICKVAL(Account_Unit_Group__c, "SC EMEA"), TEXT(Account.Region__c) = "United Kingdom & Ireland" ), "UK & Ireland", IF( AND( ISPICKVAL(Account_Unit_Group__c, "SC EMEA"), TEXT(Account.Region__c) = "Northern Europe" ), "NL & Nordics", IF( AND( ISPICKVAL(Account_Unit_Group__c, "SC EMEA"), TEXT(Account.Region__c) = "Middle East & Africa" ), "Middle East & Africa", IF( AND( ISPICKVAL(Account_Unit_Group__c, "SC North America"), TEXT(Account.Region__c) = "North America", TEXT(Account.BillingCountryCode) = "CA" ), "Canada", IF( AND( ISPICKVAL(Account_Unit_Group__c, "SC North America"), TEXT(Account.Region__c) = "North America", TEXT(Account.BillingCountryCode) <> "CA", OR( TEXT(Account.Industry) = "Asset Management", TEXT(Account.Industry) = "Bank", TEXT(Account.Industry) = "Wealth Management", TEXT(Account.Industry) = "Asset Servicer", TEXT(Account.Industry) = "Other" ) ), "NA Asset Management", IF( AND( ISPICKVAL(Account_Unit_Group__c, "SC North America"), TEXT(Account.Region__c) = "North America", TEXT(Account.BillingCountryCode) <> "CA", OR( TEXT(Account.Industry) = "Pension", TEXT(Account.Industry) = "Insurance" ) ), "Pension & Insurance", "Unmapped" ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Derived MD-1 book segment from existing region, country, account unit group, and industry fields for dashboard and Pipeline Inspection filtering.
CustomField.label: Sales Director Book
